caption:
appreciate your next cup of tea because it is a work of art ✨🍃🌿🍵🏞️✨ @destination_srilanka #haputale #srilanka 

📍Ceylon tea has been known as the finest tea around the world. Tea was first introduced to Sri Lanka 1867. We had a beautiful walk in Haputale’s tea estate, saw hand picked tea & this plantation is beautiful

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2

transcription.text: Me and mine, when the world ends and the skies tumble down Why is the water so soothing to drown? How many times, the light of the fatherless second of life Feels like forever
